panels.description: RTT percentiles over time grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  "time",
  "series",
  "value_ms"
FROM (
  SELECT
    $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
    concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey", ' | p50') AS "series",
    approx_percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "value_ms"
  FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
  GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
    concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey", ' | p95') AS "series",
    approx_percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "value_ms"
  FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
  GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
    concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey", ' | p99') AS "series",
    approx_percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "value_ms"
  FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
  GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
)
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: RTT percentiles (p50/p95/p99)

panels.description: SLO threshold breach rate over time grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  "time",
  "series",
  "pct"
FROM (
  SELECT
    $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
    concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey", ' | >1s') AS "series",
    avg(CASE WHEN "processorDurationMs" > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS "pct"
  FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
  GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
    concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey", ' | >2s') AS "series",
    avg(CASE WHEN "processorDurationMs" > 2000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS "pct"
  FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
  GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
    concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey", ' | >5s') AS "series",
    avg(CASE WHEN "processorDurationMs" > 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS "pct"
  FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
  GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
)
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Tail breach rate by SLO threshold

panels.description: Maximum RTT anomaly view grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__dateBin("time") AS "time",
  concat("swarmId", ' | ', "callIdKey", ' | ', "businessCodeKey") AS "segment",
  max("processorDurationMs") AS "max_rtt_ms"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY 1, "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Max RTT by transaction segment (anomaly view)

panels.description: Worst latency groups in the selected time range, grouped by swarmId, callId, and businessCode.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  "swarmId",
  "callIdKey" AS "call_id",
  "businessCodeKey" AS "business_code",
  count(*) AS "txns",
  approx_percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "p95_rtt_ms",
  approx_percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "processorDurationMs") AS "p99_rtt_ms",
  max("processorDurationMs") AS "max_rtt_ms",
  avg("processorSuccess") * 100 AS "processor_success_pct",
  avg("businessSuccess") * 100 AS "business_success_pct"
FROM "ph_tx_outcome"
WHERE $__timeFilter("time")
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${swarm:csv}', ','), concat(',', "swarmId", ',')))
  AND ('${callId:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${callId:csv}', ','), concat(',', "callIdKey", ',')))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' = '__all' OR contains(concat(',', '${businessCode:csv}', ','), concat(',', "businessCodeKey", ',')))
GROUP BY "swarmId", "callIdKey", "businessCodeKey"
ORDER BY "max_rtt_ms" DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Worst callId/businessCode by RTT

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "swarmId" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "swarmId"
list.label: Swarm
list.name: swarm
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "swarmId" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") ORDER BY "swarmId"

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "callIdKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "callIdKey" <> 'unknown' ORDER BY "callIdKey" LIMIT 500
list.label: Call ID
list.name: callId
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "callIdKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "callIdKey" <> 'unknown' ORDER BY "callIdKey" LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT "businessCodeKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "businessCodeKey" <> 'n/a' ORDER BY "businessCodeKey" LIMIT 500
list.label: Business Code
list.name: businessCode
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT "businessCodeKey" FROM "ph_tx_outcome" WHERE $__timeFilter("time") AND "businessCodeKey" <> 'n/a' ORDER BY "businessCodeKey" LIMIT 500
